identity.name: DayMinder / Kolbe Planner
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro x Jewel Luxury
identity.emotional_goal: Evoke a sense of elite discipline and luxurious progress. The user should feel like a CEO of their own life.

typography.installation: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&display=swap');

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 font-bold tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-neutral-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.base: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900/80 to-slate-900/40 border border-primary/20 rounded-2xl p-8 relative

inputs.default: bg-slate-950/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all outline-none

hero_bg.description: Abstract gold lines on black, use as hero background with overlay

focus_mode.description: Man working late in dark office, use for 'Focus Mode' feature section

texture_accent.description: Black and gold texture, use for card backgrounds or subtle overlays

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Force DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The app is exclusively dark.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'frontend/src/index.css' immediately.
4. TAILWIND: Update 'frontend/tailwind.config.js' to include the custom colors (navy, gold, imperial red) and font families.
5. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the dashboard. Avoid equal-sized boxes. Create hierarchy.
6. COMPONENTS: Build a 'GlassCard' component that encapsulates the glassmorphism styles to ensure consistency.
7. HERO: The Hero section must use the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy gradient overlay (to bottom) so text is readable. Headline must be massive (text-6xl+).
8. CALENDAR: The monthly calendar is the core. 100% days must glow Gold. Missed days are subtle Red. Incomplete days are neutral.
9. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, habit toggles).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
No Gradients on Text unless it's a very subtle gold shimmer on the main headline.
Micro-interactions: Every button must have a hover state. Every list item must fade in.
Spacing: Double the default spacing. If you think 'p-4' is enough, use 'p-8'.
Contrast: Ensure text is readable on dark backgrounds. Use 'text-slate-200' for body, not 'text-gray-500'.
